name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Foundation
subject: Tea Party Patriots Foundation filed an FEC complaint against Twitter!
body:
| |
---
Yesterday, Tea Party Patriots Foundation filed a complaint against Twitter with the Federal Elections Commission. The complaint also names Twitter co-founder and CEO Jack Dorsey, as well as Twitter Vice President of Global Communications Brandon Borrman.

Twitter’s blatant efforts to suppress news that hurts Joe Biden and amplify news that hurts President Trump violates federal law because of the way Twitter is legally structured.

For too long, these big tech social media platforms have censored information that doesn’t fit their worldview. This year alone the examples are seemingly infinite. Enough is enough, and it’s time we fight back.

**You[can read through the entire complaint](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjk1LTNjNmQyMDFkN2E5NzRiMTdhNmY5M2UyYjNjZGIxMTJi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtZm91bmRhdGlvbi5zMy5hbWF6b25hd3MuY29tL2RvY3VtZW50cy9UUFBGLUZFQy1Db21wbGFpbnQtdi1Ud2l0dGVyLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI4NTAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=YE1WriLKDXd2DnLcH6r1yg) for the details, and then please share this news with others.**

There is [a news article from Patriot Project](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjk1LTNjNmQyMDFkN2E5NzRiMTdhNmY5M2UyYjNjZGIxMTJi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL3RlYS1wYXJ0eS1wYXRyaW90cy1maWxlcy1mZWMtY29tcGxhaW50LXR3aXR0ZXItamFjay1kb3JzZXktcGVuYWxpemVkLWZ1bGxlc3QtZXh0ZW50LWxhdy8_bWlkPTQyODUwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=hvEHBYdoaqFgeqIGnBadNg) that you can share on social media and/or over email, [a tweet you can retweet](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjk1LTNjNmQyMDFkN2E5NzRiMTdhNmY5M2UyYjNjZGIxMTJi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9pbnRlbnQvcmV0d2VldD90d2VldF9pZD0xMzE4NjMzMjE3NjMzNzUxMDQ5Jm1pZD00Mjg1MCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=34ly3UvKd8TMJMs7OG2GIQ) and/or share over email, and you can share [the complaint itself](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjk1LTNjNmQyMDFkN2E5NzRiMTdhNmY5M2UyYjNjZGIxMTJi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtZm91bmRhdGlvbi5zMy5hbWF6b25hd3MuY29tL2RvY3VtZW50cy9UUFBGLUZFQy1Db21wbGFpbnQtdi1Ud2l0dGVyLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI4NTAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=MxVp9LDp4aPywU7H5hzfhw).

Thank you for helping us get the word out and supporting the work that we do!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

subject: Karl Rove is at it again

body:
| | | Dear Friend, The Toledo Blade [reported](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDKm16C5Jr-syi-i_8C5T1e5Ncd5Z7PhshlgR-fbe5SymxRVoywCqjf3FmYTMIGo5z5LPuDy6QNCmTSHq2Kjpt7anvYCroo-VWPwx7kchzo_Ad6YW2d0iKWND79emHdKSfWLTw12jGN096axmNtnyL-fLCfxGfeD7eXSJrkaQh57rmiyarUgCi_a1XK9PlViV7L-ZTeJNI4uwTCObuJntLGmVn6rSKo5ixNqqAaxwcoNwZwikDq6nIVLfXZa87dkDmuEO_0g4pMCt5wTRpSJ5cowR5l2Dg-uBQOwzO0fIri4qwbC9DrAHGDHbsclOwt4dRqvNIODVkrwF797hc3CDgR6kFdxD-yqK_XLFjs3LoX6kxaTUDKqiYFPuJ-VGnOuhhQ/367/QiOokkYxQB2KH8nDWIQ2Lg/h0/kuk_PRGkNggZr1R3TDeAdkZLOpVIkduaIOlEO2OKIy8) Monday that Karl Rove is playing politics in Ohio again. He is pleading with donors to help keep the Republican Majority in the Ohio Supreme Court. He knows that One Party Republican Rule in Ohio guarantees gerrymandered districts where instead of voters choosing their representatives, politicians choose their voters. [Please help me to push back on this greedy power grab by Karl Rove.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_-ofvctNWSsUAR_jBi9ofdvG3YYt0)
Ohio has some of the most egregious gerrymandering in the country. The lines were drawn by Republicans to consolidate Democratic votes. They created winding districts connected only by tiny strips of land and cut in and out of populous counties doing away with compact areas. My district, for example, has been called the snake on the lake. Ohioans want fair districts. They want their representatives to live in and know their community. I love representing all parts of Ohio's 9th, but agree that districts should be drawn fairly, should be compact, and should keep communities whole. Ohioans don’t want Republican operatives like Rove pouring money into our elections so they can rig the system for another decade. [Chip in any amount today to help us fight for fair districts and fair representation for all Ohioans.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOk7rsr9AsStoHJOO7VYrHEArGQIKZ31hISHa-6m9Hb_NA57P1nXVlHLK4o_154ti5ZiEtG5cRNu4kWHkvroM8XT0dIXBB_wj7D5GQdXqIu6ehlUTUcbI2AUaM9p6R1y3sChBEApkR1EMddLkrJisEV1pFVvNkcV5nh4btS_q0yZeL44HTWj5l6Lz9dQrrmYxkzjrZM5QFepa4uGyRU8Azy6InXhb6FpO7bSlUnKvCdNtO92SjfgHp6i_Hvp7CHMUYGTyo-1w-Um2d2rfeHjRU/367/QiOokkYxQB2KH8nDWIQ2Lg/h2/PNu2phjOjTorYiCHBl3whL8gjDfhgvlIMvAjebY6hzg) \--Marcy

clean_body: | | | Dear Friend, The Toledo Blade Monday that Karl Rove is playing politics in Ohio again. He is pleading with donors to help keep the Republican Majority in the Ohio Supreme Court. He knows that One Party Republican Rule in Ohio guarantees gerrymandered districts where instead of voters choosing their representatives, politicians choose their voters. Ohio has some of the most egregious gerrymandering in the country. The lines were drawn by Republicans to consolidate Democratic votes. They created winding districts connected only by tiny strips of land and cut in and out of populous counties doing away with compact areas. My district, for example, has been called the snake on the lake. Ohioans want fair districts. They want their representatives to live in and know their community. I love representing all parts of Ohio's 9th, but agree that districts should be drawn fairly, should be compact, and should keep communities whole. Ohioans don’t want Republican operatives like Rove pouring money into our elections so they can rig the system for another decade. \--Marcy | marcykaptur.com Paid for by Kaptur for Congress P.O. Box 899 Toledo, OH 43697 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Marcy Kaptur for Congress, please .

We can't win this election without you.

Dear Friend,

Did you see Monday's debate? (https://www.c-span.org/video/?477065-1/georgia-us-senate-special-election-debate)

Kelly Loeffler dodged one question after another about her business interests in Communist China. In fact, not only do Kelly Loeffler and her husband Jeff Sprecher have no problem doing business with companies associated with the Chinese Communist Party (CCP), but Kelly Loeffler even has a $56,000 portrait of one of the world's biggest mass-murdering dictator, Mao Zedong, in prominent display at her home. (https://twitter.com/CollinsforGA/status/1318602737844703232?s=20)

How can we trust Kelly Loeffler to "hold China accountable" while she takes their money and decorates her home with a portrait of a mass murderer?

The election is only a few weeks away and we need to make sure Doug Collins - the only candidate who has stood with the President and stood up to China - wins in November. We need your help!

Help Team Collins and volunteer to make calls toda (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/volunteer) y! (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/volunteer)

Sincerely,

Will Smith

Political Director
Collins for Senate, Inc.

clean_body: This election will come down to the very last donation. | Peter, Democrats are all-in to defeat us. They are dumping historic amounts of money - HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS - into red states in order to flip the Senate majority. Wow. There’s one thing I know: Senator Steve Daines and I will never stop fighting for you and our conservative values. But here’s the thing - We’ve reviewed the numbers, and we’re still 234 donations short of hitting our midnight goal. | This election will come down to the very last donation because every dollar you contribute will directly impact whether Senator Daines and I can fend off Obama and Schumer’s next multi-million dollar attack against us. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham P.S. These races are our only chance at keeping the GOP Senate majority, so thank you for donating before it’s too late. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. mailto:info@stevedaines.com | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana Don't want to receive our emails?

body:
We need to shine a bright light on the breaking Biden scandal.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/1561230e8372d87b/4901d2049ae195cdc3d6b838967d376c/32613) Fellow Conservative, President Trump is a job creator. So is Jerry. They’ve worked hard to succeed in the tough world of business and helped a lot of people build careers and better lives. Joe Biden? He’s created ONE job over his 47 years in politics... That was for his son, Hunter, who despite ZERO experience was putting together billion-dollar international deals when Joe was Vice President! You’ve heard about this alleged corruption. There’s a lot we still need to learn. What we do know is the Bidens’ silence on this is DEAFENING... **They have not refuted the allegations against them, which if true, point to political corruption on a scale perhaps never seen in our country’s history.** With 13 days until Election Day, we must fight to shine a bright light on this story. We need to help President Trump DEFEAT JOE BIDEN on Election Day and TAKE BACK THE HOUSE to end the far-left Nancy Pelosi regime! **[Rush your most generous possible contribution today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/1561230e8372d87b/e5ea9707b56ac486c3d6b838967d376c/32613)**. name: Brittni McGuire
subject: final digital push
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Friend,
Wow. It’s hard to believe that the election is now less than two weeks away. The WVDP has been working so hard, doing everything we can to help create record turnout, that these past few months have just flown by.
Right now, we are trying to raise money to cover our final digital push. Facebook added a new deadline, meaning that no new political ads can go up for the week leading up to the election – so we have until next Tuesday to push everything out. We’re really hoping to raise another $1,580 to spend on digital. We think at this point it’s the most efficient way to reach the most voters. Can you chip in today, and help us out? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you!
Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Stop the Green Wave
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Conservative: By now, you've heard about the "blue wave" of Democrats that could win this year, but what's powering their campaigns is a **"green wave"** of small-dollar donations. In fact, Democrat candidates are massively out-raising GOP candidates with eye-popping numbers that are up to ten times the amount raised by candidates during this time in the 2018 elections. Our candidates are actually facing a "green tsunami" this year. How is this possible? For more than a decade, the Democrats have been building a **grassroots fundraising base** to fund their candidates. They've done it using a centralized fundraising clearinghouse called ActBlue to process low-dollar contributions for their campaigns. **Rather than only donating to local candidates, the Democrats are giving to candidates thousands of miles away.** This has helped liberals raise unimaginable sums that could keep Nancy Pelosi the Speaker of the House for years to come. **[We need to use the same national model to fight back!](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=1446f8b040514e6584068d854b56f783&_e=ijcZVEaLeZfpVM1CKcFb2w0R86LE3qL6qyrpgv_AenelvyCqtuaWR2aVjM0OE7G2Od9EvWwyhcm9rU5jsveC37kwY_Ts9aCSrX-Xn1YIlqf4_Fd0HZ7HEeq9FLEUsIqUA-Q3b-fDIgdZfKqkY7x2cP18suMvGdExthdwplAUWZCzr2xQXtYP5lNpKkJNOPrulrkHx_Hn8wJvbvmK4_Yj-dSND6m9pWhCj7c2J4SRjnPpe47HC_7imF8GuhVVI50rKFIXDENNYFe71ec2sf2ypSiLFj-ZSDOmdMc2hKgDMWWPIe7HXf6oG3G0uKch_maRkmmSK_JgPw_NRzNvZLbUk9nZ3SThMVuCI5ehPNhrSJDDwe_u766TJnK3V9grxOisTPvEVBRCGIiUFZfHUA9UGZKMsdWqlmixyRxj7Dl2IjM%3D)** U.S. House races are federal elections that impact all Americans so it doesn't matter where you live – we all have an interest in helping the best candidates compete and win. **We need to work together to make sure the right candidates get the support they need to get their message out.** That's why I support the House Freedom Fund, which gives conservatives across country an easy way to donate directly to multiple candidates for the U.S. House. **[Please fight back against the "green tsunami" by making a split contribution to these priority candidates:](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=1446f8b040514e6584068d854b56f783&_e=ijcZVEaLeZfpVM1CKcFb2w0R86LE3qL6qyrpgv_AenelvyCqtuaWR2aVjM0OE7G2Od9EvWwyhcm9rU5jsveC37kwY_Ts9aCSrX-Xn1YIlqf4_Fd0HZ7HEeq9FLEUsIqUA-Q3b-fDIgdZfKqkY7x2cP18suMvGdExthdwplAUWZCzr2xQXtYP5lNpKkJNOPruC1jnjXJGYA_NV1HTpJ4N05g3DwYnGjvDZbPi5GOdSoprzoJxIzxhPc8FwseZSfStmxO_5mEckYROibs7Grsxk02OxoOZLq2kithXY6V1sQsOrdLSrd6fGVZrosnUyhR7yahLD6sEdiS-q8bvoN5WLXQ11BOTVFJ3QbgpKkt-9ZPNTcNxE9uxYGdkMTL4VOhIZifH5uj64CiRC9kGnjFgnCnh4QjyERGoJu5pK4Fs_DY%3D)** ✅ Lauren Boebert (CO-03)
✅ Nick Freitas (VA-07)
✅ Christina Hagan (OH-13)
✅ Yvette Herrell (NM-02)
✅ Jeanne Ives (IL-06)

✅ Chip Roy (TX-21) You can support all of these candidates with one transaction, and 100% of your candidate contributions go directly to their campaigns. Democrats understand what's at stake and they're working together to support their candidates in battleground races. We need to do the same, and we need to do it now. **[Please donate $5, $50, $500, $5,000 or more to these outstanding candidates. Every donation counts!](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=1446f8b040514e6584068d854b56f783&_e=ijcZVEaLeZfpVM1CKcFb2w0R86LE3qL6qyrpgv_AenelvyCqtuaWR2aVjM0OE7G2Od9EvWwyhcm9rU5jsveC37kwY_Ts9aCSrX-Xn1YIlqf4_Fd0HZ7HEeq9FLEUsIqUA-Q3b-fDIgdZfKqkY7x2cP18suMvGdExthdwplAUWZCzr2xQXtYP5lNpKkJNOPrurU9_zHlKWl_G4FT4BWZH1T8mfbsbT5Wuzc1WnRlUhNF-fJv-MucZJq5P8ZOekZjJSNMBpEw9XrhmdfD5EHnauQqGgUc2gB-_2ZY0P5Y2t8WIU4wjxr27DZ-wlS0tZShbWapWLohP9ePbPhzKRRruWTxNkG_CtNWvCR1D-pZuOHN8OOKxJnOtf5unClXvcbfuEKMp1-zbnbJTmzxC9wNZm9l_Ewz2n27W4mrfFtXtaPQ%3D)** Thank you for considering this request. name: Morton Blackwell
subject: Change college campuses across America
body:
Socialism is an epidemic among young people -- and the infection starts on college campuses.
|
---
| | | Fellow Conservative, Socialism is an epidemic among young people -- and the infection starts on college campuses. A new cadre of radical liberal politicians are on a mission to tear down the America you and I know and love. Committed socialists like Congresswomen Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ilhan Omar, and Rashida Tlaib, among others, work to expand the size and scope of government -- which would crush individual freedom, destroy prosperity, and shred the U.S. Constitution. These three congresswomen are part of a dangerous trend among young people indoctrinated by liberal ideology on college campuses. And they’re living proof that what happens in college ends up in Congress. The organization I lead, the **Leadership Institute** , aims to educate young people about the horrors of socialism -- and to organize young conservatives to fight back. **[Will you support the Leadership Institute today with a financial gift to help recruit, organize, and train young conservatives to combat socialism on college campuses?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001glDA4ud29MRVi7ZcE_WAbIArVQUNqQluHLZzGmI1hH6RgW_Sd_B1jij2vOEqiR0QOKDcaRR3gyRZvOkp1rQAk8buyskZv6HHC2Ztlxim9N7I7p70Bt8xewD0pRC02XTNcsc6uVapXSRwXs-Fr0u3yIK2ehLnO4A_Gs_1YYZPc6xjf-ImcQ7EkKFJNVOwRrb56wfPs6QgIIWoR2yfwsBioAo_66ROdrdXGiQN0HrLWcoq4jXQjnRMSLvvan4eric6qNny9LfwJsLtVqrSez8_w_azJyLQo8g8dqdJV3TOSIZuw4OZn_DIhaNT-Ah9V-G_NR95VYdIF1dIFjnVHeqRyROMLgqj2FEGfG7ZL4yseJd4Eon3zscmrGpMDNsHrnTo&c=Y0WmUSbFCUyBU_J9TXKlD8NpLlWm74hjMpXgsNEIL-4WWOJosUmIwA==&ch=RUbgZapwRx7-K5K-FqbHeQFrGiRA1dWNV0Boq1HMgmLm86Iyuvu0GA==)** It all starts when radical liberal college professors and administrators foist their heavy-handed, hate-America “social justice” ideology on impressionable students. The pressure on students to conform is enormous. Far-left professors push their socialist dogma on young people in the classroom and systematically silence conservative thought. When conservative students dare to share their conservative principles or speak up against liberal ideas, they are often ridiculed, relegated to remote areas of campus designated as “free speech zones,” or stopped from speaking at all. And now you and I are seeing this dangerous ideology spill out of universities and infect the rest of America. Your donation today is part of a much broader campaign the **Leadership Institute** leads to empower young conservatives on college campuses, defend our founding principles, and stop socialism in its tracks. I’m not surprised that so many young people have been coerced into becoming Che Guevara-loving, Bernie Sanders-supporting socialists. Each and every day, students are forced to listen to left-wing lectures and diatribes designed to make them question and reject every conservative belief they have. When young conservatives speak up in defense of conservative principles, they’re condemned and punished -- and in some cases threatened with physical violence. So, it should be no surprise that these students take the socialist views they’re indoctrinated with in college to the rest of America -- infecting Congress, our communities, and other American institutions. **With your support, we can change college campuses across the nation. Click[here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001glDA4ud29MRVi7ZcE_WAbIArVQUNqQluHLZzGmI1hH6RgW_Sd_B1jij2vOEqiR0QOKDcaRR3gyRZvOkp1rQAk8buyskZv6HHC2Ztlxim9N7I7p70Bt8xewD0pRC02XTNcsc6uVapXSRwXs-Fr0u3yIK2ehLnO4A_Gs_1YYZPc6xjf-ImcQ7EkKFJNVOwRrb56wfPs6QgIIWoR2yfwsBioAo_66ROdrdXGiQN0HrLWcoq4jXQjnRMSLvvan4eric6qNny9LfwJsLtVqrSez8_w_azJyLQo8g8dqdJV3TOSIZuw4OZn_DIhaNT-Ah9V-G_NR95VYdIF1dIFjnVHeqRyROMLgqj2FEGfG7ZL4yseJd4Eon3zscmrGpMDNsHrnTo&c=Y0WmUSbFCUyBU_J9TXKlD8NpLlWm74hjMpXgsNEIL-4WWOJosUmIwA==&ch=RUbgZapwRx7-K5K-FqbHeQFrGiRA1dWNV0Boq1HMgmLm86Iyuvu0GA==) to make your best donation now.** Together, we can keep America from going down a socialist path. Thank you. Cordially, Morton C. Blackwell
President, Leadership Institute
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

Just last year, Democrats were acting like Virginia was a solid blue state...

name: Mitch McConnell
subject: RE: It comes down to this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Thom Tillis Committee
body:
Cal Cunningham is falling in the polls. This is our chance to save the Senate.
| Friend,
---
How we act over the next 24 hours will decide the fate of our Senate majority.
---
Chuck Schumer's handpicked candidate for the tipping point Senate race in North Carolina -- __Cal Cunningham__ \-- is falling in the polls.
---
**But Schumer is not giving up on his quest to buy this seat. He 's spent $80 MILLION to prop up Cunningham and attack Senator Thom Tillis.**
---
As Republican Senate Leader, I'm helping Thom fight back. I will unlock a 6X-MATCH for 30 minutes upon hitting our goal to win this race.

name: Jim Oberweis
subject: We need to fund our GOTV effort
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim 2020 Committee
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/6eb0748841bb1dee/afe1944f366e78fec3d6b838967d376c/34533) Peter, I know you’re busy, so I will keep this short. We are coming up just shy of our GOTV budget to turn out voters in this race, and if you can spare it, any amount to help us raise an extra $15,000 right now would be a God-send. [**DONATE $8.32 RIGHT NOW TO TURN OUT 1 GOP VOTER**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/6eb0748841bb1dee/369553d77b77bb5bc3d6b838967d376c/34533) Remember, it only costs us $8.32 on average to turn out a GOP voter, so if we hit our $15,000 goal tonight, we can be rest assured that we will put another 1,803 voters in the bank for Republicans on November 3rd. It’s going to take every one of them and more, so thank you for anything you can do. **[Will you help right now with a $5, $10, $25, $50 or your best possible contribution to help us stay in this fight?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/6eb0748841bb1dee/e0070b1ed98c508cc3d6b838967d376c/34533)** If you’ve already given, thank you so much, but given the time constraint could you help us find another voter by forwarding this message to them? Thanks,
Jim Oberweis [**CHIP IN NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/6eb0748841bb1dee/ee22a2ae139bbefdc3d6b838967d376c/34533) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/6eb0748841bb1dee/dd56585faa462f41c3d6b838967d376c/34533)

Remember, it only costs us $8.32 on average to turn out a GOP voter, so if we hit our $15,000 goal tonight, we can be rest assured that we will put another 1,803 voters in the bank for Republicans on November 3rd. It’s going to take every one of them and more, so thank you for anything you can do. subject: Jackie Walorski: A dereliction of duty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Every dollar we raise in the next week ensures voters of IN02 know that Jackie has failed the people of her district. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b3efa33dcd&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=79783851bb&e=5886ca081d)
---
|
Dear Friend,
Today, we are facing a national crisis. There is a lack of public trust in government and a lack of true representation of the people. No wonder when you have purchased seats and representatives like Jackie Walorski, who has been derelict in her duties.

_[Your donation goes directly to keeping Pat up on television to counter Jackie’s misinformation campaign.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=05fee567ea&e=5886ca081d)_

Jackie Walorski is derelict in her duty, and we need to call her out of hiding.

* Jackie has failed to keep us healthy in the midst of a pandemic, voting repeatedly to gut protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions and supporting a lawsuit to take away people’s health insurance.
* She has failed to protect working families, supporting a tax bill to benefit the rich.
* She has failed to use science to fight COVID-19, leading to more than 220,000 preventable deaths.
* She has failed to show up for work, skipping 1/3 of votes during the height of the pandemic.

_[Express Donate $10](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=1b21380334&e=5886ca081d)
[Express Donate $25](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b6271fccdc&e=5886ca081d)
[Express Donate $50 ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=f2bbebc6dd&e=5886ca081d)
[Or Donate another amount](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=1a9f062a0d&e=5886ca081d)_

Because Jackie’s campaign is funded by special interest groups, corporate PAC dollars are keeping Jackie on TV. Jackie’s lobbyist friends are making sure her misleading ads are playing three times as much as Pat’s ads.

[_Our People-powered campaign, however, knows that there is strength in numbers._](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=0db0128afb&e=5886ca081d) **If everyone gives a little, we can do a lot.** We can drown out Jackie’s lies and tell the truth about what’s at stake in this election – Dignity and Justice for All, not the few.

Jackie’s actions in office have been a dereliction of duty. _[Every dollar we raise in the next week ensures voters of IN02 know that Jackie has failed the people of her district. ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=7221756e74&e=5886ca081d)_

It’s time to send Jackie home,

Patrick
---

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Javier Martínez
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
[](https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75ae66/43d8135f/642ecfbe/51067cbd/3636807317/VEsH/?g=EoemE2V4ADlaKjl2zM0Tbw "https://martinheinrich.com/")
---
Hi there, I've been working closely with state and local leaders to do all we can to support New Mexicans during this pandemic and its economic impacts. And I've seen just how important it is to elect strong advocates at every level of government. That's why I'm emailing you today. **I am proud to endorse Javier Mart inez for State House of Representatives, District 11.** [](https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75ae66/43d8135f/642ecfbe/51067cbc/3636807317/VEsE/?g=EoemE2V4ADlaKjl2zM0Tbw "http://www.javiermartinezfornewmexico.com/") Javier has a deep commitment to New Mexico's working families. Always ready to take on the hardest of work, Javier has been a fearless leader in the New Mexico House. He has led the effort to invest in our youngest children. And he's been a champion for bringing fairness into our tax structure, helping New Mexicans get food on the table. I know Javier and I know he will always put New Mexico first. **Join me in supporting Javier as we get him elected in November.** I hope you and your loved ones are safe and healthy, and I'm honored to serve as your United States Senator. Thank you, Martin Heinrich
---

clean_body: "" Hi there, I've been working closely with state and local leaders to do all we can to support New Mexicans during this pandemic and its economic impacts. And I've seen just how important it is to elect strong advocates at every level of government. That's why I'm emailing you today. I am proud to endorse Javier Mart inez for State House of Representatives, District 11. "" Javier has a deep commitment to New Mexico's working families. Always ready to take on the hardest of work, Javier has been a fearless leader in the New Mexico House. He has led the effort to invest in our youngest children. And he's been a champion for bringing fairness into our tax structure, helping New Mexicans get food on the table. I know Javier and I know he will always put New Mexico first. Join me in supporting Javier as we get him elected in November. I hope you and your loved ones are safe and healthy, and I'm honored to serve as your United States Senator. Thank you, Martin Heinrich | PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125 ""

clean_body: He’s leading the fight for Texas. | Friend, Nancy Pelosi bought two Republican congressional seats in Texas in 2018. U.S. Army Captain Wesley Hunt is the GOP nominee to win one of them back in 2020. Polls currently show that his election is tied and within the margin of error. Your last-minute support at the final hour could be what puts him over the top. Nancy Pelosi has admitted in emails to her donors that this seat in Texas could make or break her House majority. That’s why I want to be confident that I did everything I could to help Wesley win this race. In a race this close every dollar makes a difference. I hope Wesley can count on your support to give him the lead in this TIED race. Thank you, Nikki Haley 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. clean_body: Cal Cunningham is falling in the polls. This is our chance to save the Senate. | Peter, How we act over the next 24 hours will decide the fate of our Senate majority. Chuck Schumer's handpicked candidate for the tipping point Senate race in North Carolina -- Cal Cunningham \-- is falling in the polls. But Schumer is not giving up on his quest to buy this seat. He 's spent $80 MILLION to prop up Cunningham and attack Senator Thom Tillis. As Republican Senate Leader, I'm helping Thom fight back. I will unlock a 6X-MATCH for 30 minutes upon hitting our goal to win this race. Cal Cunningham's strategy was to hide from the public and let his left-wing donors like Schumer and George Soros buy this election for him. At the last end-of-quarter deadline, he raised a staggering $28 MILLION. That doesn't even begin to include the $80 million Schumer is spending on his behalf. But voters are now starting to see right through Cunningham, who says he "joins the fight" of protesters who want to "abolish the police." However, the race is still far too close for comfort, and we need to fight back against the Left's multimillion-dollar attacks. Thank you, Mitch McConnell Paid for by the Thom Tillis Committee Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

The millions of dollars being funneled to our opponent from outside of the state are being used to buy up airtime across the district and drown out our message – **we can’t let that happen.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: How the White House Is Seeking Justice for Native Americans
body:
Violence against Indigenous women and girls transcends state and national borders. President Donald Trump has remained committed to our cause. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fa675cd996&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **How the White House Is Seeking Justice for Native Americans**

“From Wyoming's Wind River Country to members of Canada's First Nations, the crisis of violence against Indigenous women and girls transcends state and national borders. Here in our own country, presidents of both parties have tried and failed to find lasting solutions,” Rose Dunleavy writes in _U.S. News & World Report. _

“To his credit, President Donald Trump has remained committed to our cause.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dc3e9f73e8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The U.S. Department of Justice filed a much-anticipated lawsuit Tuesday accusing Google of abusing its dominant position in online search and advertising to cement its market power”—similar to the 1998 lawsuit against Microsoft. “For Big Tech, it’s a reckoning that’s been a long time coming,” the [_Los Angeles Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=392b84b134&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “More and more medical professionals are recognizing the severe damage the lockdowns have caused to present and future public health. A worldwide collection of medical and public health experts has just issued a declaration stating that current ‘lockdown policies are producing devastating effects,’” including suicides, delays in crucial medical care, drug and opioid abuse, and domestic violence, James Lucas writes in [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=225b971af9&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump has made combating Jew-hatred a top national priority,” including by hosting a first-ever U.S. Government conference on fighting Anti-Semitism online. “In the online world, increasing numbers of the world’s youth are lured into dangerous virtual neighborhoods where they are vulnerable to poisonous influences and can be lost to violent radicalization,” U.S. Special Envoy Elan Carr writes in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fead5d8cfa&e=3ee4985eea).

**MORE:**[**With U.S. help, Israel makes another historic Middle East deal**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=64ed0ba8c2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6a29de2a9f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3b137cce09&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=b184384978)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Democrats Riding a Green Wave
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Conservative: By now, you've heard about the "blue wave" of Democrats that could win this year, but what's powering their campaigns is a **"green wave"** of small-dollar donations. In fact, Democrat candidates are massively out-raising GOP candidates with eye-popping numbers that are up to ten times the amount raised by candidates during this time in the 2018 elections. Our candidates are actually facing a "green tsunami" this year. How is this possible? For more than a decade, the Democrats have been building a **grassroots fundraising base** to fund their candidates. They've done it using a centralized fundraising clearinghouse called ActBlue to process low-dollar contributions for their campaigns. **Rather than only donating to local candidates, the Democrats are giving to candidates thousands of miles away.** This has helped liberals raise unimaginable sums that could keep Nancy Pelosi the Speaker of the House for years to come. **[We need to use the same national model to fight back!](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=b4d03ac542d5490fa997a546ad057cce&_e=DYmZGKtrhKaob3Y_14Ybc3dChaPq5Uh2mzSMX1wo4DNmWvYnAC-85UT2aueJ9SQrh_bJYEe2iDLAmn5qO9HcI03h473j8atWPKb-8ysiGFcongVITqVE1Qy8aI7-Ar5zebQi7tCbjouhU8GaGs9rMRRoXuatnfCSoxuIYv_UU2SmSKfNTd5gGzwUumxY_gQOyUvPoaGF--o4EX7yh3B86FwgjiCiRur5f7P8zDRG1Qmqqz18si79mIZV-sIMgeGHwn5JFBmelcXaDfKT4NCerb1tipoN4YVteCiJNWD2XvLJUzWSOzjHt6H_E88Izi0YWAjCXb-9eIlVeOON1M_Ro1wR_GMicmzR6KwBZ7h-LP0X_abFTuazOQVUVfxqfx6AXYr8MMJYxWxn-hisit4g5E5Vf4sZK6_4EcKG0BOdlh8%3D)** U.S. House races are federal elections that impact all Americans so it doesn't matter where you live – we all have an interest in helping the best candidates compete and win. **We need to work together to make sure the right candidates get the support they need to get their message out.** That's why I support the House Freedom Fund, which gives conservatives across country an easy way to donate directly to multiple candidates for the U.S. House. **[Please fight back against the "green tsunami" by making a split contribution to these priority candidates:](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=b4d03ac542d5490fa997a546ad057cce&_e=DYmZGKtrhKaob3Y_14Ybc3dChaPq5Uh2mzSMX1wo4DNmWvYnAC-85UT2aueJ9SQrh_bJYEe2iDLAmn5qO9HcI03h473j8atWPKb-8ysiGFcongVITqVE1Qy8aI7-Ar5zebQi7tCbjouhU8GaGs9rMRRoXuatnfCSoxuIYv_UU2SmSKfNTd5gGzwUumxY_gQOATs8Ri_UfWFBV7jxPcdDxAK3UTociKC42phZeYly9GU2LsjB3bq9WiZ3fxxeBJT9pooe2jgS1EdFlsXoJU7mdLx7G6ffWI6L-bwwdlGKew9l-bzWGtMd9p1Vemhqb0EPvcdz2Aa-I5rcKzEFeGer33nGNLP9IkZibOvRmSOX5R_-s-yekHpdF87XjZHozZGDLwbGoH9W4XKbtBVbledIKmyG8CbcvVvU-jlBAUclgpw%3D)** ✅ Lauren Boebert (CO-03)
✅ Nick Freitas (VA-07)
✅ Christina Hagan (OH-13)
✅ Yvette Herrell (NM-02)
✅ Jeanne Ives (IL-06)
✅ Jim Marchant (NV-04)
✅ Rich McCormick (GA-07)
✅ Matt Mowers (NH-01)
✅ Jim Oberweis (IL-14)
✅ Burgess Owens (UT-04)
✅ Scott Perry (PA-10)
✅ Greg Raths (CA-45)
✅ Matt Rosendale (MT-AL)
✅ Chip Roy (TX-21) You can support all of these candidates with one transaction, and 100% of your candidate contributions go directly to their campaigns. Democrats understand what's at stake and they're working together to support their candidates in battleground races. We need to do the same, and we need to do it now. **[Please donate $5, $50, $500, $5,000 or more to these outstanding candidates. Every donation counts!](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=b4d03ac542d5490fa997a546ad057cce&_e=DYmZGKtrhKaob3Y_14Ybc3dChaPq5Uh2mzSMX1wo4DNmWvYnAC-85UT2aueJ9SQrh_bJYEe2iDLAmn5qO9HcI03h473j8atWPKb-8ysiGFcongVITqVE1Qy8aI7-Ar5zebQi7tCbjouhU8GaGs9rMRRoXuatnfCSoxuIYv_UU2SmSKfNTd5gGzwUumxY_gQONgT5PWAmgA-JXEDUDEzibuTa0V6J0Fb6R-jzj00JBaJ7nN92sidGeCgFgL8WEcL2s-HOGvOp1S6H5BBROSXoT3h11lYSpnCLLqiOYBrRYXcrGLwxJHf_PDZYSHk54DyHPpRB-_PtdpIqC42vlaqxDAu91jBJCobMXKH_aWNjAflxkwe2LsTZgqa4X02gJoXovb1qO30Px2kUcn9qlBUnNe2bhKSEoQa30qk3o0Hqlbo%3D)** Thank you for considering this request. With your support, we can stop the "green wave" and elect more leaders who will truly fight for our conservative principles and values. Sincerely, JIM JORDAN U.S. Congressman, R-Ohio | |

name: Mia Love, me (2)
subject: FW: Mark Kelly is getting away with this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mia Love PAC
body:
Let's defend these patriots...
| Friend,
---
I shouldn't be surprised, but the media is sweeping Democrat Mark Kelly's latest scandal under the rug.
---
Mark Kelly's spokesman was caught calling police **_" worthless f*cking pigs,"_** but the media went dead silent and refused to report on it just like they've done with Joe Biden's scandals.
---
But while the mainstream media refuses to tell voters the truth about Mark Kelly's extremism, Friends of Mia Love is doing critical work in Arizona to help Martha McSally defeat him.
---

subject: RE: It comes down to this

body:
Cal Cunningham is falling in the polls. This is our chance to save the Senate.
| Peter,
---
How we act over the next 24 hours will decide the fate of our Senate majority.
---
Chuck Schumer's handpicked candidate for the tipping point Senate race in North Carolina -- __Cal Cunningham__ \-- is falling in the polls.
---
**But Schumer is not giving up on his quest to buy this seat. He 's spent $80 MILLION to prop up Cunningham and attack Senator Thom Tillis.**
---

clean_body: Cal Cunningham is falling in the polls. This is our chance to save the Senate. | Peter, How we act over the next 24 hours will decide the fate of our Senate majority. Chuck Schumer's handpicked candidate for the tipping point Senate race in North Carolina -- Cal Cunningham \-- is falling in the polls. But Schumer is not giving up on his quest to buy this seat. He 's spent $80 MILLION to prop up Cunningham and attack Senator Thom Tillis. As Republican Senate Leader, I'm helping Thom fight back. I will unlock a 6X-MATCH for 30 minutes upon hitting our goal to win this race. Cal Cunningham's strategy was to hide from the public and let his left-wing donors like Schumer and George Soros buy this election for him. At the last end-of-quarter deadline, he raised a staggering $28 MILLION. That doesn't even begin to include the $80 million Schumer is spending on his behalf. But voters are now starting to see right through Cunningham, who says he "joins the fight" of protesters who want to "abolish the police." However, the race is still far too close for comfort, and we need to fight back against the Left's multimillion-dollar attacks. Thank you, Mitch McConnell Paid for by the Thom Tillis Committee Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. We accomplish this by working directly with Republican leadership in the states and providing them with resources, training, and funding. We have nearly 200,000 donors in all 50 states. The RSLC invested a record $45 million into state-level races in the 2017-2018 election cycle, which contributed to state-level Republicans maintaining 61 of 99 legislative chamber majorities, holding 25 lieutenant governor seats, and 29 secretaries of state offices. Your support is critical to making this happen. You can learn more about us at RSLC.GOP.

First, Joe Biden fundraised for him.
Then, Pete Buttigieg fundraised for him.
_Now, Cory Booker is fundraising for him_

In the final moments, Lying Gil is pulling out the big guns because he knows his lottery fortune can't stop a grassroots movement like ours. He's counting on max-out checks, dark money dollars, and PAC contributions to drown us out.

[**Friend, can you chip in $4 right now to help us fight back?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016evmunTA-u3Gk025jNNBaD9UNMtZeBHMbeDsG4iRCq0mHXU2IieGdxYfCwLsyYLabozmAFermrZh4EXg92fFcFxGF1I4BUbIiNVde_mJlJvl2zEb_VT9lCMDBFM1B0r_-PuqauofzW2Z9m7eCbumYIdX8_cZhViUbYmMEKf5sUP1Qi5L7cl4HWIUghlHei_2qUo8CP3RUlRYDn9I3fidgKjT9Kw8A8vQLKy_csRcPlAZCu8L1dokfYAbvLhOAYxNAU-Ja3ZvRFZpleHdXFS6IsnvnmxC47MzXVNntWuK4PzdnwVWBACQj9XHmCagcNnNPiALyHbAWQrdJJEFcKRFGb5yu2VTBsY6E1VKCwrgvvyiIps81fznkDeAy50d5MWcpJ6MV0dDpyQIbpiyOqqOPJQPnj6E9DBl7rTedICpLK4f5ZNBOibNlvahnNqbcTe3NqntJAHjO6v0UBgCIIjm3K9mppeRnIdR&c=WD7Yw6cpMj-I8zZedjzoi03-kzOSMApZVLr9w_t0jKllOIc1142NXQ==&ch=RjSVgmTw_FC737j6fpsQnDtvGibtENGy7NQNmsFcyV1uYwpAywfDAA==) $4 might seem like nothing compared to the $10,00,000.00+ the Far Left spent attacking us, but if everyone who read this email chipped in a few dollars, we'd win in a landslide.

The Trump Presidency and the McConnell Senate Majority.

But if we let Republicans take New Mexico, that chance will be dead in the water.

Can I count on you in these final 7 hours? >>_**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bda3/18e32a7f/4b60a0d9/7b2086a6/3432464631/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyMCIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjcwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTMwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTgwIn0%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20201021_em_fr_b1_mlg_90_rs&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bda3/18e32a7f/4b60a0d9/7b20815f/3432464631/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bda3/18e32a7f/4b60a0d9/7b20815c/3432464631/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bda3/18e32a7f/4b60a0d9/7b20815d/3432464631/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bda3/18e32a7f/4b60a0d9/7b208159/3432464631/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bda3/18e32a7f/4b60a0d9/7b20815b/3432464631/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bda3/18e32a7f/4b60a0d9/7b208152/3432464631/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United. Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today? ""** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, "". If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on "" or "" or "" or online at www.benraylujan.com_. Click "" to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. name: Tom Cotton
subject: Biden is in Big Tech’s pocket, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
Big Tech has Joe Biden in their pocket. They're counting on him to win this election. Chuck Schumer only needs to flip FOUR seats next month to regain the Senate Majority, and he's unloading his war chests. Democratic dark money groups are doing the same to win up to TWELVE seats. == As you know, Republicans have fallen drastically behind in the fundraising race against the Left this cycle and we are more vulnerable than ever before. Chuck Schumer only needs to flip FOUR seats next month to regain the Senate Majority, and he's unloading his war chests. Democratic dark money groups are doing the same to win up to TWELVE seats. I 'm asking for your immediate help. With just 13 days until the election and ballots already being cast, I refuse to let Chuck take the Senate without a fight. Join me? == From their failed impeachment hoax to their shameful politicization of Judge Barrett's confirmation hearings, Chuck Schumer and the Democrats have demonstrated they have no interest in helping Americans. They are only interested in scoring political points and pushing their radical, socialist-inspired agenda. Democrats will undoubtedly attempt to pack the Supreme Court with liberal activist judges and end the filibuster rule, paving the way for them to ram the Green New Deal, open borders and socialized medicine through Congress. The Republican Senate is our last line of defense. I am asking you to help me save it and hold the line. You may be our last hope. body:
Liberals in the Senate are preparing to all vote "NO" on Amy Coney Barrett's confirmation. Peter, _**Liberals in the Senate are preparing to all vote "NO" on Amy Coney Barrett's confirmation.**_ They aren't voting "NO" because they believe she's not qualified; they are voting "NO" because she is not the progressive, activist justice liberals want in the Supreme Court. **Amy Coney Barrett will follow the Constitution and _not_ make policy from the bench. ****It should be clear to __everyone__ that unelected judges should not let their personal beliefs influence their rulings. ** Still, _liberals don’t see it that way._ They want an activist judge to hand down policy decisions that favor them and their socialist agenda. **We must show our support for the Founding Fathers, our Constitution, and well-qualified judicial nominees like Amy Coney Barrett.** [**Donate _HERE_ to Defend Our Bedrock Principles**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=c426cdc1851245e39a8fe1c77502cdb9&_e=4epNi6W-fomapQCbs-KzRZrVKbiE_lxTXR660_ARk6Uwg7yWNiUOeu2jpvFjLaHiQ1F2UDR9GUujTs_ACCJ74_8mrDFRmVkRjMhja7HuC2Gy1VDYsla8H1z0EoxJGl_6PDLsM3KlfuenqkO8NOv18gS4VNfwSzWhW2DcdX4gZ8k3pIzD9BkmAXmFgbhKCpkwy3Uf4mgO6TyhAqucmf65P14msCz9X4kWnu75runVVFLzsZqgVbQWegUokUEyzEF7jvecUGAHHzMGKbytOTBHv8DHLlPbIOce77EfdOgjGL7Mn5-ZkO3PPhDqAVuJt5GxB-a59BnpNoBu3fi_BytDTVuQ6mm7Np9tAxMyZXTydIKtqt1hrYJHJShhBPYZPBJuBLQoNZEuZ0MN6WN2YSNv0SkUnZatTIdC4z9WX8emRm8%3D) If we lose the Senate, there’s a good chance liberals will add seats to the Supreme Court (_“court-packing”_) and fill those seats with liberal, activist justices. __**We cannot afford to lose the Senate and allow them to defy the Constitution.**__ Help us keep the Senate **RED** and uphold our Constitution before progressives tear it to shreds by packing our beloved Supreme Court with career politicians who legislate from the bench. [**_Protect America’s Future_ \- Donate _NOW_!**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=c426cdc1851245e39a8fe1c77502cdb9&_e=4epNi6W-fomapQCbs-KzRZrVKbiE_lxTXR660_ARk6Uwg7yWNiUOeu2jpvFjLaHiQ1F2UDR9GUujTs_ACCJ74_8mrDFRmVkRjMhja7HuC2Gy1VDYsla8H1z0EoxJGl_6PDLsM3KlfuenqkO8NOv18gS4VNfwSzWhW2DcdX4gZ8k3pIzD9BkmAXmFgbhKCpkwy3Uf4mgO6TyhAqucmf65P22AYmsxdedrZJIKAKp3Tzb1NwDKoJsbM-knMzslnnqj3NUM_Jiptoo1akUV3ohqacQlRY3zZ71mlFxNo5Gg7QLqf0hq4XksSksWwRK0x-GXP2rpdvdcfszdONng-J1z5uWnCKiwkRzydwKeOfvtVNynraFr6KH40CnAIOq9KOlMedYRw67QwvRnP-wnOnNWT6lpajWPZnT9GdmLXeWBs0s%3D) Thank you,
Josh Hawley | |

clean_body: | = | | Hey folks ― Mike’s campaign manager here. Early voting started a few days ago here in Texas, and that means our campaign has been kicked into overdrive. It’s go time, and there’s not a moment to lose. = Our path to victory relies on us turning out as many voters as we can. We’ve reached out to over 1 million voters throughout the district, and we’re not slowing down. But right now, we can’t afford to expand our voter outreach programs. We’re still $3,528 away from our $10,000 to Flip TX-10 Goal. There’s no time to catch up, so we NEED to hit this goal before midnight.= | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = We need all hands on deck right now if we’re going to turn out enough voters to win this thing. name: Jim Jordan
subject: Green Wave
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Conservative: By now, you've heard about the "blue wave" of Democrats that could win this year, but what's powering their campaigns is a **"green wave"** of small-dollar donations. In fact, Democrat candidates are massively out-raising GOP candidates with eye-popping numbers that are up to ten times the amount raised by candidates during this time in the 2018 elections. Our candidates are actually facing a "green tsunami" this year. How is this possible? For more than a decade, the Democrats have been building a **grassroots fundraising base** to fund their candidates. They've done it using a centralized fundraising clearinghouse called ActBlue to process low-dollar contributions for their campaigns. **Rather than only donating to local candidates, the Democrats are giving to candidates thousands of miles away.** This has helped liberals raise unimaginable sums that could keep Nancy Pelosi the Speaker of the House for years to come. **[We need to use the same national model to fight back!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fb531f174f6b4e13b9354f4546bc0775&_e=Ommb0E5ZmiESchK4IUQl9BF2nw83tecXt4vBZ0rTSOvWi_d9sp0B0_fy3DA35BT7s_NVqMwXjV48N6sVilG5woOScEXARtfj833TZ_6YiwKGDcXcqlx2XCD3j3mYGPW1O0jV72cMiaK6j0P6RMRzz7B2Frv1N-q_AeeCycbpO3T4igd9boQWFTGhcYIkEYJYehgmLYeDfYBa9gpY_IJ5xMV1ZfMVMJIP705AKK7n_bGy7bxvz1Nmj1QGPNbmqOuHnlHEsdDgiVjWNxQZzRPnlH-p_nNQfKlXJqwVk8GzDTJGjJfc9E4MNq4p4jZlboZpB-cO479JklLeQlhXnVb3NwOBxhXiMLK2PCxsp-dGYnyTsT1DfR5HaC_cR7EWfPb5dfsyqhJ5xLUgYyd0M_JUkt_uUVBLy3Ks0kQyxnIBEXg%3D)** U.S. House races are federal elections that impact all Americans so it doesn't matter where you live – we all have an interest in helping the best candidates compete and win. **We need to work together to make sure the right candidates get the support they need to get their message out.** That's why I support the House Freedom Fund, which gives conservatives across country an easy way to donate directly to multiple candidates for the U.S. House. **[Please fight back against the "green tsunami" by making a split contribution to these priority candidates:](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fb531f174f6b4e13b9354f4546bc0775&_e=Ommb0E5ZmiESchK4IUQl9BF2nw83tecXt4vBZ0rTSOvWi_d9sp0B0_fy3DA35BT7s_NVqMwXjV48N6sVilG5woOScEXARtfj833TZ_6YiwKGDcXcqlx2XCD3j3mYGPW1O0jV72cMiaK6j0P6RMRzz7B2Frv1N-q_AeeCycbpO3T4igd9boQWFTGhcYIkEYJYWFkSaX9cxFt6dRI3vOgF2gGf5SDJzFoaJVseQyYVTWQZ6dbHN5V5iNFabCxWCBdQDEGjHrTR7P2frUn3UQ2EgNBXfYAuLgLufV47FfKh8vW5FzW2uHIFpozY9OpOTp4BTi-OFUDJDpWON_sC60mXUD6GuZMJHHrXk_EUvnhEWbldYXfCUtZm2nMZEPCLylb9SFM18UjfBwmmPgH--Kj6KCL8sILQJcrXewev4hF-e8Q%3D)** ✅ Lauren Boebert (CO-03)
✅ Nick Freitas (VA-07)
✅ Christina Hagan (OH-13)
✅ Yvette Herrell (NM-02)
✅ Jeanne Ives (IL-06)
✅ Jim Marchant (NV-04)
✅ Rich McCormick (GA-07)
✅ Matt Mowers (NH-01)
✅ Jim Oberweis (IL-14)
✅ Burgess Owens (UT-04)
✅ Scott Perry (PA-10)
✅ Greg Raths (CA-45)
✅ Matt Rosendale (MT-AL)
✅ Chip Roy (TX-21) You can support all of these candidates with one transaction, and 100% of your candidate contributions go directly to their campaigns. Democrats understand what's at stake and they're working together to support their candidates in battleground races. We need to do the same, and we need to do it now. **[Please donate $5, $50, $500, $5,000 or more to these outstanding candidates. Every donation counts!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fb531f174f6b4e13b9354f4546bc0775&_e=Ommb0E5ZmiESchK4IUQl9BF2nw83tecXt4vBZ0rTSOvWi_d9sp0B0_fy3DA35BT7s_NVqMwXjV48N6sVilG5woOScEXARtfj833TZ_6YiwKGDcXcqlx2XCD3j3mYGPW1O0jV72cMiaK6j0P6RMRzz7B2Frv1N-q_AeeCycbpO3T4igd9boQWFTGhcYIkEYJY2CFgt-CzDLRjtCNz0kG1h90Py3jji1ZDB4TGXwdLzT1PMgXWwxDq7nQevGYjUyN7wrp_EQGOh30pSrYiV3yWR7IHAOYsPcOdSTlQtzjUsea_78Onyujhqu0jEXXatdR3SmMDl2EKiGAmLBL-J9fyPNOZAaQjBeUajq42ppoHtJAIGCjmDA3pAzKL1wn2mcT4PF3nlVGqQVMU1DkRopUnYou4bjdncjTajuI0HeBR3KQ%3D)** Thank you for considering this request. With your support, we can stop the "green wave" and elect more leaders who will truly fight for our conservative principles and values. Sincerely, JIM JORDAN U.S. Congressman, R-Ohio | |

name: NH Trump Victory
subject: Debate Watch Parties Tomorrow Night!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
| |
---
Derek,
The Trump Victory Team will be hosting a Watch Party for the FINAL Presidential Debate **Tomorrow, October 22 ND **at the **BluAqua RestroBar** in Downtown Manchester. Just 12 days out from Election Day, we will be rallying together to support President Trump as he takes on the radical left-wing agenda of Joe Biden!
Food and drinks will be available for purchase, and the debate will be streamed across several TVs! Trump t-shirts, bumper stickers, and other Trump swag will be available on a first-come-first-served basis.
For further information and to RSVP, sign up below to attend **Thursday Night, October 22 nd** at **8:00 PM** , at the BluAqua RestroBar, 930 Elm St., Manchester, NH 03101.
[_**RSVP HERE****(Manchester)**_](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTM3MDEzNDE1NzcwMzMwNDc1JmM9cDZmMyZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzYwMTE1MTEmZD10MmQwcTZy.wPm09eY2H651bqQeu9LBeLWs4cq-5qlw1GmsCuRDwoc)

Patriot,

name: Maggie Thomas, Evergreen
subject: The tools to address environmental racism
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
You don't have to be a policy wonk to appreciate this.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1038?t=2&akid=3840%2E53494%2EfYz_o5) Friend, In an election year marked by a national reckoning with structural racism and an escalating climate crisis, there is more and more talk -- from the campaign trail to social media -- about the need for environmental justice. **[Read our new policy memo, written alongside our friends at Dēmos, to learn how Congress and the next president can take action on equity mapping, which will take us from talking the talk on environmental justice to walking the walk.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1038?t=3&akid=3840%2E53494%2EfYz_o5)** | [LEARN MORE ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1038?t=4&akid=3840%2E53494%2EfYz_o5)
---
So what is equity mapping? Equity maps give policymakers the data-driven tools to identify which communities are experiencing cumulative impacts from environmental and social harms. Through equity mapping, we can _finally_ understand the extent that racist practices like decades of permitting polluting fossil fuel power plants in low-income and communities of color have on a national scale. And this idea is popular with voters! **[According to a new Data for Progress poll](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1060?t=5&akid=3840%2E53494%2EfYz_o5)** , 67% of voters support equity mapping.
The EPA launched a basic equity mapping tool called EJSCREEN a decade ago, but its characterization of environmental burdens is woefully deficient. In fact, Senator Elizabeth Warren, in conjunction with our memo's release, sent a letter today to the EPA saying as much.
Just like the climate crisis, decisively addressing environmental racism calls for a national approach -- one that accounts for the cumulative impacts that pollution and economic inequality have had on frontline communities throughout the country. That's exactly what our memo proposes.
We are proud that Evergreen's policy team had a hand in influencing the Biden-Harris climate plan, which calls for 40% of green investments to go toward frontline communities. That's the "what" that needs to be done. The "why" is devastatingly clear. Our new memo describes the "how," which will be a keystone policy for the next presidential administration to achieve both climate and environmental justice.
**[If you care about environmental justice, read the Evergreen/Dēmos policy memo to learn how we can go from talking about it to making it a reality.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1038?t=6&akid=3840%2E53494%2EfYz_o5)**
For all the data behind it, equity mapping isn't about parts per million; it's about people. It's about investing resources in a way that makes frontline communities safer, healthier, and more resilient -- physically and economically. And it's about creating environmental and economic policies in America that are defined by justice and inclusion, not racism and exclusion.
Thank you for reading,
Maggie Thomas
Political Director, Evergreen
[LEARN MORE ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1038?t=7&akid=3840%2E53494%2EfYz_o5)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=3840%2E53494%2EfYz_o5). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---
All content © 2020 EVERGREEN ACTION, All Rights Reserved

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Sen. Cornyn's cowardly Washington games
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
He's forgotten his Texas values.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c29/7f51f7bc/4638754c/4efbde3c/1968243421/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c29/7f51f7bc/4638754c/4efbde33/1968243421/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201021.2nd__2372__&amount=10")
---
Peter,

Here in Texas, we know that it doesn't mean crap if you say one thing in private and say something else in public -- **but Sen. Cornyn is playing Washington games by trying to pull a fast one on us.[Don't let him get away with it.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c29/7f51f7bc/4638754c/4efbde33/1968243421/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201021.2nd__2372__&amount=10")**

He's trying to convince Texans that he "privately" opposed spending money from the defense budget on a useless border wall. Well, the truth is that **Sen. Cornyn VOTED in FAVOR of paying for that border wall by stripping money away from the military!** So much for "private" opposition.

He's seen the polls that show us neck-and-neck, and now he's running for cover. Let's call this what it is: a blatant election year stunt. And we're not buying it.

He's gotten so embedded into Washington politics that he's forgotten his Texas values, Peter. **We need a senator who 'll do what they say and say what they do, and that's MJ.**

And folks, it gets worse. He tried to explain away his cowardice with a big dose of sexism:
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c29/7f51f7bc/4638754c/4efbde33/1968243421/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201021.2nd__2372__&amount=10")
---
Y'all, Texas women are tough. **[Pitch in to help us elect a badass Texas woman who'll stand up for what she knows is right.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c29/7f51f7bc/4638754c/4efbde33/1968243421/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201021.2nd__2372__&amount=10")**

Let's show Sen. Cornyn that this isn't a political game, and Texans know you can't have it both ways.
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c29/7f51f7bc/4638754c/4efbde32/1968243421/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201021.2nd__2372__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c29/7f51f7bc/4638754c/4efbde31/1968243421/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201021.2nd__2372__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c29/7f51f7bc/4638754c/4efbde30/1968243421/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201021.2nd__2372__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c29/7f51f7bc/4638754c/4efbde37/1968243421/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201021.2nd__2372__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c29/7f51f7bc/4638754c/4efbde36/1968243421/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201021.2nd__2372__")**
Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c29/7f51f7bc/4638754c/4efbde33/1968243421/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201021.2nd__2372__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c29/7f51f7bc/4638754c/4efbde35/1968243421/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2372&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c29/7f51f7bc/4638754c/4efbde34/1968243421/VEsHBg/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Ethan
subject: You can double your donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
Hi Peter,
In case you missed Betsy's email below or haven't had a chance to donate yet, we've got good news! Betsy's supporters rose to the occasion and we hit our $1,000 match from this donor!
Now, _ANOTHER_ angel donor has stepped up after seeing how well the first match went! A new angel donor will match donations up to $1,000 today! Chip in with what you can and your dollar goes further. Let's get Betsy's message on the air as soon as possible. [You can click here to contribute.](https://act.myngp.com/el/gEdeuF5bRlkAF0AJa8ifI67-D5oS1vdd3AWB1zF4jBI=/7fYue_inY5aPxJ7K_CKJabRf2s8PkZMs2EDCEEJZBoo=?refcode=10.21bump) Thanks so much!
Sincerely,
Ethan
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Betsy** **
Date: Wed, Oct 21, 2020
Subject: Jeopardy for $1,000
To: <[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/gEdeuF5bRlkAF0AJa8ifI67-D5oS1vdd3AWB1zF4jBI=/mhvSF2OQTQD93FQz0v9FD6Zy5mnYifwkCpZjlGHO3hk=)>
| | | |
---
---
_**Did you know?**_ It take $1,000 to run my ad _just once_ during Jeopardy. With many people early voting, **we need your support today** to make sure we have the resources needed to share my message with voters. And getting those messages on tv where people will see and hear them is critical. To help, an angel donor has offered to match donations up to $1,000 to help get an ad on the air. **[So anything you can donate--$10, $25, $100 will be doubled today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/gEdeuF5bRlkAF0AJa8ifI67-D5oS1vdd3AWB1zF4jBI=/7fYue_inY5aPxJ7K_CKJabRf2s8PkZMs2EDCEEJZBoo=?refcode=10.21)** Without corporate PACs, I rely on grassroots supporters like you. And there are more of us than there are of them. We can do this. Sincerely, [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gEdeuF5bRlkAF0AJa8ifI67-D5oS1vdd3AWB1zF4jBI=/wqlfIeo-rVIRF9kOqUYketTODBNNujkIOKTV3zWqIxE=?refcode=10.21&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gEdeuF5bRlkAF0AJa8ifI67-D5oS1vdd3AWB1zF4jBI=/wqlfIeo-rVIRF9kOqUYketTODBNNujkIOKTV3zWqIxE=?refcode=10.21&amount=50) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gEdeuF5bRlkAF0AJa8ifI67-D5oS1vdd3AWB1zF4jBI=/wqlfIeo-rVIRF9kOqUYketTODBNNujkIOKTV3zWqIxE=?refcode=10.21&amount=255) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gEdeuF5bRlkAF0AJa8ifI67-D5oS1vdd3AWB1zF4jBI=/wqlfIeo-rVIRF9kOqUYketTODBNNujkIOKTV3zWqIxE=?refcode=10.21&amount=100) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gEdeuF5bRlkAF0AJa8ifI67-D5oS1vdd3AWB1zF4jBI=/wqlfIeo-rVIRF9kOqUYketTODBNNujkIOKTV3zWqIxE=?refcode=10.21) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gEdeuF5bRlkAF0AJa8ifI67-D5oS1vdd3AWB1zF4jBI=/fHyKqFgaPM0ghpIKF48yFi0wkENcyfr4q7e44cDCCAI=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gEdeuF5bRlkAF0AJa8ifI67-D5oS1vdd3AWB1zF4jBI=/BL1nXtUr0AqPkOxpHJYyaRaVl_wyLflJAx5mnr5fI74=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gEdeuF5bRlkAF0AJa8ifI67-D5oS1vdd3AWB1zF4jBI=/qxLWk1JxA1DX67DFiPPEC5rWdSzjcrwKRBbTeuiCNbI=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gEdeuF5bRlkAF0AJa8ifI67-D5oS1vdd3AWB1zF4jBI=/N13jpwViSKjrf_pjhi7Gmbpubct827mMGkYlgmAaPfo=)

Peter,

Democrats are all-in to defeat us. They are dumping historic amounts of money - HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS - into red states in order to flip the Senate majority. **Wow**.

There’s one thing I know: Senator Steve Daines and I will never stop fighting for you and our conservative values. But here’s the thing - **[we need your URGENT SUPPORT in order to fight the Left’s MASSIVE war chest.](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=feff46cea3ca4fc784080364bf3d3bb7&_e=6Vr5_2imV8LwCbUY-kkBYPJvTCh2yWO7YRrg1YwTfvB3bWu8UyHKZcQ2L1-No4HTH5AI1Q5DpNtgBWKCBRjNO0aGp3cPUGYuLWqV7-_yiin7rFo6EubZyGWtD_6FJsf-rvTH7gOwECveTNmkGAZfGg0JLlBrP5qk9HB0OPb4NJ-v-oI7R9iKSh-QWw7C_tFtM2cbMkL20yBoCv2lho_TvJy0BpZFjUGndrpVn5nAWP9ejmPaChy2u4dUB-60z6NVt6TO_rlxAyP7fA2w3d4CYkxJNZymO2wh0M78pP_8SO_0mG3BHbt0P5nIOoaiQ8113HqEWfeNr0RIDmjfKn1mniNgFK5oM6W49-L95uKcZgxMAh4Io_IXRU6fMu9Us7W9xsrpweGhCBKAEa1oupE16Q%3D%3D)**

**[We’re counting on your support.](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=feff46cea3ca4fc784080364bf3d3bb7&_e=6Vr5_2imV8LwCbUY-kkBYPJvTCh2yWO7YRrg1YwTfvB3bWu8UyHKZcQ2L1-No4HTH5AI1Q5DpNtgBWKCBRjNO0aGp3cPUGYuLWqV7-_yiin7rFo6EubZyGWtD_6FJsf-rvTH7gOwECveTNmkGAZfGg0JLlBrP5qk9HB0OPb4NJ-v-oI7R9iKSh-QWw7C_tFtmoyQsBpIUzMSho6PkBoU_LDrHrERHKC2eGAcF6I0UMOm55exgpfK5tpYU309isRmCv5p7Qf-r3XG_rCOgRRZH5p0KdsalFjQ0HR1aYZiDXPP7Qb61zdHjFZKDYBNDAs05qYUqNHs0LJw9IYpwfzfhunexPHGT2Vx35cgPdtamVYaYTUd6SfCAJ9fjrc23jV3pA2lBzPFeTIpKXbdzr7KKg%3D%3D)**

**[My opponent raised $57 million in the last three months- more than any Senate candidate in history, but I know with your contribution - of even just $5 or $10 - we can BEAT the Left, PROTECT our Senate majority, and SAVE the Supreme Court.](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=feff46cea3ca4fc784080364bf3d3bb7&_e=6Vr5_2imV8LwCbUY-kkBYPJvTCh2yWO7YRrg1YwTfvB3bWu8UyHKZcQ2L1-No4HTH5AI1Q5DpNtgBWKCBRjNO0aGp3cPUGYuLWqV7-_yiin7rFo6EubZyGWtD_6FJsf-rvTH7gOwECveTNmkGAZfGg0JLlBrP5qk9HB0OPb4NJ-v-oI7R9iKSh-QWw7C_tFtHEyUk0KTI3pxugKQIHXlrf_NVlcSuBzT4npXVwooPwnce0S505gY4L8LEDr1oZKWZTkCpc7bD-7ZxVgoEDES5caCiT0VUoAp8LuReOfMuRDUJV-7EDIDEfmT_4X6lXZAhNWBcbvdPbjH4snunsWUj-Cj4TEsl9KUUNAkC4KWOvxBqf0Ca-1Hci4Q6rD1zRKFnZuaTbt25eQqRQYTpX-gHA%3D%3D)**

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. **[The contribution you make today will be split to help Steve Daines in Montana and my campaign in South Carolina.](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=feff46cea3ca4fc784080364bf3d3bb7&_e=6Vr5_2imV8LwCbUY-kkBYPJvTCh2yWO7YRrg1YwTfvB3bWu8UyHKZcQ2L1-No4HTH5AI1Q5DpNtgBWKCBRjNO0aGp3cPUGYuLWqV7-_yiin7rFo6EubZyGWtD_6FJsf-rvTH7gOwECveTNmkGAZfGg0JLlBrP5qk9HB0OPb4NJ-v-oI7R9iKSh-QWw7C_tFtbj3k-XA04r4Y6JcSzaeC4Qs2JxPxH-HN3gbHWdr-DF0mvuz4yR7a0iK0-D-hAMXtbQ4xg8KxjOPsfYF9R6KQSb7w5PXRNWSMx-JszyhZ73lpIqF8_QOAgVV_ek3dlieFgNk6OWMkI7myxWmzKh2QsPTm8V8GCCeNGie1NB0AsSXkxUbUg3sFIwxmmBL4TtC93h4aoyeNp3creTFRETi8Bg%3D%3D) **These races are our only chance at keeping the GOP Senate majority, so thank you for donating before it’s too late.

body:
Peter, Lara Trump knows we cannot afford to lose Lindsey Graham as a conservative voice in Peter, Lara Trump knows we cannot afford to lose Lindsey Graham as a conservative voice in the Senate. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=09b7258d8f7646d8a983ecf1458d35fa&_e=c9GXr1gHKT99LY_Juvp4mn8BoFrJpDZdB7UUJvPh7JX9EXfYM9GzCK7W6kXm0PtRUXK04fPCxUK1xKm6s2tgDTN9G1g-lrPQi9TDR0JGZ3eywfhLJCIaIwKTwyuwHHYMCXnZ9N1zTqxk6_M70m2ae31-8NEh2zjbPAsfK5IjiSqhxL9bK-mRXdtAJ0XYBNE5Oo9uD1ObStzIEbBuPbXtrTEBOhB4wZv8Bo2MI_xgd-owj6hLolMamAfYtI4GJKgdeUcrz7a3hkdU1DdcdkcdyPTJWV6wumttepkDZcl1mox-whxKrb7ZUwx-n0DMSNcx36l66g2j-Qy7zxhsHyGKJyJRdoLV7v86rmcFYAz5I1bfgkcn_YXTyil59QkDuPXn0Jc0lzR3Xy6XOBI3692yCg%3D%3D)

Trump for President Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 and 80810 to opt-out. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Tina and MJ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
I like women who fight back, speak up, demand change, and get big things done. That's Tina. And that's MJ. | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251fc/45c30650/1c66a6abf/66e8bcaf/3780978026/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Women have been told to sit down and be quiet for a long time.

But we have always persisted. We will continue to persist -- and now, we're doing it louder than ever.

We're fighting to recover from this pandemic and economic crisis, which is hitting women -- especially women of color -- the hardest.

We're fighting against right-wing extremists who are trying to steal a Supreme Court seat, roll back Roe v. Wade, and go after access to birth control.

**And we're fighting to take back the Senate with strong Democratic women candidates. That includes Minnesota Senator Tina Smith -- who's up for re-election in a state that Donald Trump nearly won last time -- and MJ Hegar in Texas, who's neck and neck in the latest polls.**

**[Let's help Tina Smith and MJ Hegar fight back and win so we can flip the Senate. If you're able to, please split a contribution of $2 or whatever makes sense to support Tina, MJ, and Warren Democrats. Every donation makes a difference in the critical final two weeks of this election season.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251fc/45c30650/1c66a6abf/66e8bcae/3780978026/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXRzLW1oIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVcxMEZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAxMDIxX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ts-mh?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW10F_EGR_END_E_20201021_V1S1_P")**

I like women who fight back, speak up, demand change, and get big things done.

That's Tina. And that's MJ.

Tina has led the fight to make sure Minnesotans have affordable, high-quality health care, ensure economic and social equality, and put hard-working families first, including through our work to prioritize funding for child care and help support parents and families during this pandemic. We need leadership like Tina's in Washington.

As a decorated combat veteran and working mom who has lived through many of the challenges facing Texans, MJ is a proven fighter. She will ensure every Texan has affordable health care, economic opportunity, and a government that works for people -- not corporate special interests and billionaires. She embodies strength, courage, independence, and an unwavering commitment to putting families first.

**By re-electing Tina, and putting MJ over the top in Texas, we can help make sure Democrats hold onto -- and flip -- the seats we need to secure a Senate majority.**

**[Please support Tina, MJ, and our re-election campaign with a contribution if you can today-- and help keep up the fight.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251fc/45c30650/1c66a6abf/66e8bcae/3780978026/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXRzLW1oIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVcxMEZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAxMDIxX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ts-mh?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW10F_EGR_END_E_20201021_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251fc/45c30650/1c66a6abf/66e8bcae/3780978026/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXRzLW1oIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVcxMEZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAxMDIxX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ts-mh?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW10F_EGR_END_E_20201021_V1S1_P")

Peter,

In 15 terms in Congress - _30 YEARS_ - radical liberal Maxine Waters has accomplished absolutely nothing.

In the time this radical politician has been in office, here’s what I’ve been doing:
* Grew up in South Central L.A.
* Survived a drive by shooting while living in Maxine’s district
* Graduated high school
* Enlisted in the U.S. Navy
* Participated in Operation Iraqi Freedom
* Retired from the military after 13 proud years

And now, [**I am running for Congress against Maxine Waters to hold her accountable**](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=0e950b8e2ee54e149d9b0a2d603db440&_e=maoUrR1BeegERFNyZBDwD0UMp-7HHIW7Htlg52AEDxgH6F0-0W1G0tM6-HVsDNp00S20ZnEJWy7ge1RTgHbs1iqjGYekntaY_X7wmNAm5V2t6kjhTWXTLfvbTeHd-VBdzXzjth3-YajHyOwhBMH2dvkBXvUjgGIqbMpEO01_CSqi4u3nAUe-B9fPqoWEYLUYB8g06JQ8OrsSamhMHGS0y25OEpB_yUXfcAWECWSgvbt7gkSsFLPIceSC6f9IZR8StG8VklSZgL-3UibodOPkbXjiVRdS5fkJ6fgWrsyMX3U98zqHwMykd2fx-Wq0iNKdMRD99u4dcoay9oNB2XvEkHYPpPAOymKjJ1C5e9bBGgfDrzZDzIIaKpYO6Uxn8T7vuGDwQDfq-3mqWOvdpOEELKZSqN1IEKNbCvIlKPq98gM%3D) for not only doing nothing to help our district, but for devestating it with her radical socialist policies.

[**HELP JOE DEFEAT MAXINE »**](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=0e950b8e2ee54e149d9b0a2d603db440&_e=maoUrR1BeegERFNyZBDwD0UMp-7HHIW7Htlg52AEDxgH6F0-0W1G0tM6-HVsDNp00S20ZnEJWy7ge1RTgHbs1iqjGYekntaY_X7wmNAm5V2t6kjhTWXTLfvbTeHd-VBdzXzjth3-YajHyOwhBMH2dvkBXvUjgGIqbMpEO01_CSqi4u3nAUe-B9fPqoWEYLUYLelbfAVm0T7v8Qr4-KbWaTviu8ZxTXkvMYQFBHc10isfKq04Ss6haRdOpaKou1mAhDobMMROFcq7AwQarDqL3z8DNsEixzB7HFKwWgXLkoEYs0YK7RSvm43FqJ1IUoqa6oaMgJcEdKiIfX7JB9wvZmuD-L4_BSYxgXzj1CSAJtQW-0-ciyZUY4vD_tAqJmi0MRn-hloqrmVAApLKmS7Rt5YGDiMA0FWCIW3orvnhbB8%3D)
Maxine's district - _my home_ - is overrun with crime, drugs, violence, poverty, and homelessness. Yet, her focus is on attacking Donald Trump from the comfort of her $6 million mansion outside the district.

**And because she has no accomplishments to stand on, she's counting on attacking my military service record and my support for President Trump in order to keep her seat.**

My mission is two-fold:
1. Defeat Maxine so we can began repairing the damage she and her failed policies have done to Los Angeles
2. Make sure these destructive policies don't spread to your community and the rest of our country

[**We have less than two weeks to succeed in kicking Maxine out of Congress and I need your help. Will you chip in $25, $40, $100 or more to help me and my campaign get the job done?**](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=0e950b8e2ee54e149d9b0a2d603db440&_e=maoUrR1BeegERFNyZBDwD0UMp-7HHIW7Htlg52AEDxgH6F0-0W1G0tM6-HVsDNp00S20ZnEJWy7ge1RTgHbs1iqjGYekntaY_X7wmNAm5V2t6kjhTWXTLfvbTeHd-VBdzXzjth3-YajHyOwhBMH2dvkBXvUjgGIqbMpEO01_CSqi4u3nAUe-B9fPqoWEYLUYc_qF0NxMOtFsHFigr5Fy0XjEOjhIo_3pZojnA_BUn5gYVXRc1ehwgZNcQLbYXQytM51E3JkbU-RWLKAS6Xc9TDHKJflQTKPG0al2zb3J0hBEdOSEzt7Fszf9B2MnxDDBWSveQIAaAVeQWpN6SVwOIXEDKbTpjQn1A22Al5HaBQcgGOXaYQE17GbbrVC7e8CeeUhc2mPE7lHyz_lKE6tqjnn9uxh7hk2AtpbYiVEPZyU%3D)

Joe Collins
