And because she has no accomplishments to stand on, she's counting on attacking my military service record and my support for President Trump in order to keep her seat. My mission is two-fold: 1. Defeat Maxine so we can began repairing the damage she and her failed policies have done to Los Angeles 2. Make sure these destructive policies don't spread to your community and the rest of our country Thank you! Joe Collins U.S. Navy Veteran Republican for Congress | | Joe Collins is a black conservative, Navy veteran, and Republican from South Central Los Angeles, and he is running to to defeat radical leftist Maxine Waters. ---|--- Joe Collins For Congress 5777 W. Century Blvd STE#1110-143 Los Angeles, CA 90045 | | ---|---|--- Joe Collins is a veteran of the United States Navy. name: Team Warner
subject: You've heard from a lot of people...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

So far this month, you've received emails from Joe Biden, Lisa Collis, and Tim Kaine asking for your help to send Mark Warner back to the Senate. Mark is committed to continue the work he's already started: making health care more affordable for every Virginian, protecting health care coverage for those with pre-existing medical conditions, and creating an economy that works for all Virginians. We're less than two weeks away from an election that can change the tide for Virginia and the country. And these folks have been reaching out to you, Derek, because it's crucial that we keep leaders like Mark in the Senate fighting for a brighter future.

**[If you have the means, please consider pitching in to keep Mark Warner in the Senate, fighting for us.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da3e/53d9897e/55451ac3/1c88fb6d/1885381397/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-all?refcode=20201021_f_1_nd__890__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

We can't take anything for granted. At this point in 2014, our team was confident that Mark would win his election. He did win -- but that race was decided by just 17,000 votes. That's why we're kicking things into high gear right now. It takes a lot of resources to keep this campaign running, and even $5 makes a difference.

Thank you once again for your unwavering support for Mark Warner. We couldn't do this without you.

-- Team Warner

P.S. Virginians have been voting early in record numbers, and the last day to vote early is October 31. Whether your plan is to vote in person, mail in your absentee ballot, or vote in person on Election Day, having a voting plan is essential to take action and change the course of our future. Visit [iwillvote.com](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da3e/53d9897e/55451ac3/1c88fb6c/1885381397/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://iwillvote.com/") to learn more about the options available to cast your ballot.

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da3e/53d9897e/55451ac3/1c88fb6b/1885381397/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-all?refcode=20201021_f_1_nd__890__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da3e/53d9897e/55451ac3/1c88fb6a/1885381397/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: Republicans are voting for Dani left and right *wink*wink*
body:
One of the biggest complaints we have heard about my opponent, from the beginning of the campaign, has been that he always chooses his party over the | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c35d94bfa1b2/republicans-are-voting-for-dani-left-and-right-winkwink?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
One of the biggest complaints we have heard about my opponent, from the beginning of the campaign, has been that _he always chooses his party over the people_. We knew coming into this race that our best opportunity to beat him would come by having earnest, good-faith conversations with as many voters as possible.

For the past week, I’ve been calling the district’s strongest Republican voters.

And brace yourself for what might come as a shock...

**These conversations are awesome. **

These voters are overwhelmingly Dani voters by the end of the call. They recognize and value what we have been saying all along -- that even if we differ on the ideological spectrum, they know, after a conversation with me personally -- that I am going to go to Congress and fight for what I believe in my heart of hearts is in their best interest.

They know I’m going to Congress to fight for all of them, for every single one of us.

We’re less than two weeks from Election Day and I’m earning thousands of Republican votes. _**Everyone is persuadable.**_

[Can you make a donation to help us keep getting our message out? ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=0cb75f9dfb&e=140a9b81e7)

Thanks!
Dani

This debate is our LAST OPPORTUNITY to show the people of New Mexico the very clear difference between my New Mexico First platform and Ben Ray’s partisan DC voting record. HOW YOU CAN HELP IN OUR FINAL PUSH: 1\. Spread the word on your social media throughout the day tomorrow. 2\. Invite your friends, family, co-workers and neighbors to tune in. 3\. Follow us on and throughout the debate and retweet our posts. Thank you so much for your support, Mark P.S. Tonight is my last debate with Ben Ray Lujan. Tune in to KOAT at 7:00 pm MT to watch the debate! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO ==

Peter,

We're in the _final two weeks_ of the campaign! Our Bikers are in every battleground state, from Wisconsin down to Florida, turning out MAGA voters!

That means everyday our Bikers are covering thousands of miles to stop the violent Left from stealing this election and turning America into a Socialist third-world country.

In a race that could come down to a few votes, we can't afford to have any of our Bikers run out of gas or supplies!

[**We need our Donors to help us reach our final fundraising _ goal of $75,000 _before the election to keep our Bikers on the road for President Trump!**](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=901cde60531747888c1f62334ef5141c&_e=FkLn8F8FK09cVML3Rc4iv_iibEkFSKXiCDT3_R2dB2O0Mt6iFo48AGuOiKA5WOdOS43oeUv05iK36jZ_m98w5bAM611f9a3-aDmnNOdcnbdYphykExb2MGkzJ162jIHFI2vwukzN-hCoCeaGaWEqKwhvLgXygjozDMFHFuKtVdYE-zzj96kugTe4Vsp8WyGBhW8j3Fj11Th9JCi69M2GFt8uUQOGOlCOzAgsFCqQq0XoSgKdtH7U-lttFIiRIDRJu-CjRJjHngNCFtEIUljQzRI6MDdGhSibzwQQ38JvssjFUPd4K8_aBs7RWZ0XGmTyrQH8zT7h2fBb4JD8W8STHmlAV8rcjRpGPIzPI3fNtl98hjFr4bpeFiQq6bZm3f58I4uWo5G5KYNS6eLcHHNOPj-R5i4HclR_mO-5bRHRstZW9Jp20GubLetB4vXVwyiK)

One Biker in one day can talk to up to 100 voters. If just one Biker is put out of commission for these last two weeks that's 1,400 voters we won't be able reach!!

The violent Left would be more than happy to see our Bikers taken off the road. We've stopped them from harassing Trump supporters in Tulsa and Milwaukee, **and now they know we're gearing up to turn out MAGA voters for Trump in record numbers!**

Bikers for Trump is leaving nothing on the table in this election. [**That's why we need your immediate donation to reach our end of election fundraising goal of $75,000 to turn out as many voters for President Trump as we can.**](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=901cde60531747888c1f62334ef5141c&_e=FkLn8F8FK09cVML3Rc4iv_iibEkFSKXiCDT3_R2dB2O0Mt6iFo48AGuOiKA5WOdOS43oeUv05iK36jZ_m98w5bAM611f9a3-aDmnNOdcnbdYphykExb2MGkzJ162jIHFI2vwukzN-hCoCeaGaWEqKwhvLgXygjozDMFHFuKtVdYE-zzj96kugTe4Vsp8WyGBhW8j3Fj11Th9JCi69M2GFt8uUQOGOlCOzAgsFCqQq0WHVNkdTqSVNMQQ6bPvRt2WWKIUQQdVoWLGkt7qCX4SsjI8CXv4pT7mVUFNlLGZeU6iGybVTdv4yn0j27PBPgYOcrrKSJvj5eQlTP9zxIf47Nzu7bUk_JnPlwiK6fIgRDFAQkMl1EwWJGw5szbPNp6Byt7smADvWth_J3Sv3EafUsq07u5pj-Eim9y_BZg7_V0nZNiUSc8bCaSBLAUmULum)

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Artificial intelligence
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
COVID-19 has disrupted our lives and hurt our economy both nationally and locally, putting far too many Rhode Islanders out of work. As we rebuild our economy, we can't go back to the old "train and pray" model. We need to build on the new paradigm that's created thousands of jobs in Rhode Island over the last few years - "train, support, hire." That's what our Back to Work program is all about, and today I'm excited to announce a new resource available to job-seekers through this program.
In partnership with Google and the tech-for-social-impact nonprofit Research Improving People's Lives (RIPL), we're launching a Virtual Career Center and a first-of-its-kind Artificial Intelligence-powered job-matching tool to help Rhode Islanders who are out-of-work.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019YsNuoOGfUNSc96OsCUXPk_jG2xSgk3AuAGbJGmE-DBeyI3kgpXtibsMRbKUkW7iwCitLNRTvPwGELtYfDM5eD7Z7zjhIs8jOOk1bDLfZBrIBGUvk9jmzTn-fs2erFnVQjj1LCXLf4GGBMtY0e3qRj07XKgoXDzFvr9cvNskrB9C96YXEKliqUXNb3IEyGYULCN7AywfCd4=&c=X5Khi9CQCRwyeCV7RdGxAHz-RON6bLuqzt9xNnqdCLqNGbwZILjwRA==&ch=J1FOfb-GhdEQMiBXUELEumr4e7_NCbOQm5sfuttgsieXZ_wYQ25Uuw==)
---
| Today, if you go to [BackToWorkRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019YsNuoOGfUNSc96OsCUXPk_jG2xSgk3AuAGbJGmE-DBeyI3kgpXtibsMRbKUkW7ieez3FjcAjBLiYneHwgflBJtkkQL9RYedG_-kFTbECeqP6IDOg6hT_qHFZdMWryFIa7tMjEGAV0NqfB4PIwe0MA==&c=X5Khi9CQCRwyeCV7RdGxAHz-RON6bLuqzt9xNnqdCLqNGbwZILjwRA==&ch=J1FOfb-GhdEQMiBXUELEumr4e7_NCbOQm5sfuttgsieXZ_wYQ25Uuw==), you can get started with the basics of this new job resource. First, you can search and apply for the 100 job openings and more than a dozen job training programs that have already been created through Back to Work. You can chat with "Skipper" - our new virtual assistant - who can direct you to available job resources. And you can complete a career recommendation assessment, where you fill out information about your skills and interests to receive personalized notifications when there are job openings that might be a good fit.
Within the next month, [BackToWorkRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019YsNuoOGfUNSc96OsCUXPk_jG2xSgk3AuAGbJGmE-DBeyI3kgpXtibsMRbKUkW7ieez3FjcAjBLiYneHwgflBJtkkQL9RYedG_-kFTbECeqP6IDOg6hT_qHFZdMWryFIa7tMjEGAV0NqfB4PIwe0MA==&c=X5Khi9CQCRwyeCV7RdGxAHz-RON6bLuqzt9xNnqdCLqNGbwZILjwRA==&ch=J1FOfb-GhdEQMiBXUELEumr4e7_NCbOQm5sfuttgsieXZ_wYQ25Uuw==) will also house the Virtual Career Center, bringing together all our state's job resources and supports. You'll be able to schedule a virtual meeting with a career coach and job recruiter. You'll be able to work on your resume and have it edited for free by a professional coach. And "Skipper" will get more advanced and be able to help you by asking personalized questions and steering you to job opportunities that are the right fit.
All of this is part of our existing $45 million commitment to Back to Work RI. If you're looking for a job, please take a look at the site and let us know what you think. Together, we're going to show the nation how to kick-start an economy that puts workers first.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019YsNuoOGfUNSc96OsCUXPk_jG2xSgk3AuAGbJGmE-DBeyI3kgpXtibsMRbKUkW7iSTHH-AlTMgdFkHd8jwPaiNmPN6JTmxEStkyI9WKuKbqIgWMzK_cCE7GPFhg9Cw9k_OSAvgCOaNmtESwmOr2nNp25DScHKhPojhtsi_XQS3yNJLzw0Ah5kP_KYupk1fD1KLTHDwuH2-1XlPN6I7LUaSY9ur6XTuLlI-4YH_YTyczL7s-aAdhN6-h7jnX9BO6lQBTfRnGz0CYo9CkyjXS23j5cPstj5j-gYrqf8uCGbTvLzvIFKumXzo2UP3QgOTQO1f8NHIyVPBc=&c=X5Khi9CQCRwyeCV7RdGxAHz-RON6bLuqzt9xNnqdCLqNGbwZILjwRA==&ch=J1FOfb-GhdEQMiBXUELEumr4e7_NCbOQm5sfuttgsieXZ_wYQ25Uuw==).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019YsNuoOGfUNSc96OsCUXPk_jG2xSgk3AuAGbJGmE-DBeyI3kgpXtiQs-jrzuwWNSILILy-QvTbzGz5W5b9DF325iNI3kdFfOEfVFKcGihAC0GyVfhZPuTrhgub79IdzFRYo65NraM_K8zu8aoykukKn-aL7XLtRiPSxFB8A70RLdyWMLfnSEFzSdbsgYbBaOMPSnwLi2TMA=&c=X5Khi9CQCRwyeCV7RdGxAHz-RON6bLuqzt9xNnqdCLqNGbwZILjwRA==&ch=J1FOfb-GhdEQMiBXUELEumr4e7_NCbOQm5sfuttgsieXZ_wYQ25Uuw==)

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Did you watch the debate? Here’s what you might have missed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Did you see Governor Holcomb take the debate stage on Tuesday? He laid out a stirring vision of what One Indiana for All looks like and talked... | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

Did you see Governor Holcomb take the debate stage on Tuesday?

He laid out a bold vision of what One Indiana for All looks like and talked about all the progress we’ve made over the last four years.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Democrats want to abolish ICE. President Trump wants to help ICE abolish human trafficking.
body:
In 2018 alone, more than 23,000 human trafficking victims were identified in the United States... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7042c65fbd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 21, 2020
---
| | |
# **Democrats want to abolish ICE. President Trump wants to help ICE abolish human trafficking.**

**In 2018 alone** , more than 23,000 human trafficking victims were identified in the United States. Of these victims, 65% were women. More than 1 in 5 were children.

**It’s a “level of evil** that you would never believe is even possible in a modern age,” President Trump said in January. “The level of evil is incredible.”

**President Trump has joined** law enforcement officers to fight for the voiceless and end this scourge of modern-day slavery in our country. U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE)—which Democrats have called to be abolished—has arrested more than 5,000 human traffickers over just the past three years.

**“I want to thank ICE.** They have been incredible,” President Trump said.

**Rather than dismantle** law enforcement agencies, as the far left demands, President Trump has doubled funding for the Department of Justice to combat human trafficking.

**The President** also signed the largest DOJ grant package in history to stop trafficking. It included, for the first time ever, grants to provide safe housing for survivors.

**All told,** since taking office, President Trump has signed nine pieces of bipartisan legislation that target human traffickers, both domestically and internationally.

**This week** , the Trump Administration released its [**National Action Plan**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8d2e23eca9&e=3ee4985eea) to build on these important steps. It lays out a strategy in three parts: prevention of trafficking, protection for victims, and prosecution for the criminals who fuel this evil industry.

**In January** , President Trump recognized the 20th Anniversary of the Trafficking Victims Protection Act. That day, he signed an Executive Order on Combating Human Trafficking and Online Child Exploitation in the United States. With that order, he created the first-ever White House position focused solely on ending trafficking.

**Americans also heard that day** from Bella Hounakey, a survivor of trafficking whom President Trump invited to speak at the White House.

**“At age 13** , I was brought into this country. I survived trafficking, along with 19 other girls. Afterwards, I was placed in foster care, but this negative experience in my past should not wholly define who I am today,” she said.

**“Today, I am** a college graduate. Today, I am an American citizen.”

**Last fiscal year** , ICE initiated 1,024 human-trafficking and forced-labor related cases. These actions led to 2,197 criminal arrests, nearly 700 convictions, and, ultimately, the rescue of more than 400 victims.

**📖**[**The Trump Administration Is Fighting the Evil of Human Trafficking**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cde3ee8e53&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Under President Trump, our First Americans are being put first again!**

**President Trump** is committed to honoring the heritage of America’s first inhabitants, our Native American communities. To that end, his Administration just released a plan to continue partnering with Native Americans to build a brighter future for all people.

**The plan,** titled “[Putting America’s First Peoples First: Forgotten No More](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4b1ad4751f&e=3ee4985eea),” outlines President Trump’s core principles to fight for these communities:
* Respecting tribal sovereignty and self-determination

* Promoting safe communities

* Building a thriving economy with improved infrastructure

* Honoring Native American heritage and improving education

* Delivering better health outcomes

**President Trump’s policies** will add 51,000 Native American-owned businesses and up to 196,000 new jobs for tribal communities. In addition, tribal entrepreneurship will be supported through growing opportunities for access to Federal contracting.

**With a priority on education** , Federal investments will be increased in tribal colleges and universities, and $10 million is pledged to support the creation of new tribally operated charter schools. Federal funding will be doubled for the improvement of quality Bureau of Indian Education schools and other education options, as well.

**The plan** also continues to prioritize the important work of [**Operation Lady Justice**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9a46a65695&e=3ee4985eea), President Trump’s task force to address missing and murdered indigenous persons.

[**MORE: How the White House Is Seeking Justice for Native Americans**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f8c23b975f&e=3ee4985eea)
---

clean_body: In 2018 alone, more than 23,000 human trafficking victims were identified in the United States... | | | | | The White House • October 21, 2020 | | | Democrats want to abolish ICE. President Trump wants to help ICE abolish human trafficking. In 2018 alone , more than 23,000 human trafficking victims were identified in the United States. Of these victims, 65% were women. More than 1 in 5 were children. It’s a “level of evil that you would never believe is even possible in a modern age,” President Trump said in January. “The level of evil is incredible.” President Trump has joined law enforcement officers to fight for the voiceless and end this scourge of modern-day slavery in our country. U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE)—which Democrats have called to be abolished—has arrested more than 5,000 human traffickers over just the past three years. “I want to thank ICE. They have been incredible,” President Trump said. Rather than dismantle law enforcement agencies, as the far left demands, President Trump has doubled funding for the Department of Justice to combat human trafficking. The President also signed the largest DOJ grant package in history to stop trafficking. It included, for the first time ever, grants to provide safe housing for survivors. All told, since taking office, President Trump has signed nine pieces of bipartisan legislation that target human traffickers, both domestically and internationally. This week , the Trump Administration released its to build on these important steps. It lays out a strategy in three parts: prevention of trafficking, protection for victims, and prosecution for the criminals who fuel this evil industry. In January , President Trump recognized the 20th Anniversary of the Trafficking Victims Protection Act. That day, he signed an Executive Order on Combating Human Trafficking and Online Child Exploitation in the United States. With that order, he created the first-ever White House position focused solely on ending trafficking. Americans also heard that day from Bella Hounakey, a survivor of trafficking whom President Trump invited to speak at the White House. “At age 13 , I was brought into this country. I survived trafficking, along with 19 other girls. Afterwards, I was placed in foster care, but this negative experience in my past should not wholly define who I am today,” she said. “Today, I am a college graduate. Today, I am an American citizen.” Last fiscal year , ICE initiated 1,024 human-trafficking and forced-labor related cases. body:
Show off your smarts and your support for Pat at the same time. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=5ccdc1ba79&e=5886ca081d)

|
Dear Friend,

Show off your smarts and your support for Pat Hackett for Congress all at the same time.

We’d love to have you join us this Friday at 7 pm for a TGIF Trivia Night, with proceeds going to help our campaign for Dignity and Justice for All.

We’re less than two weeks away from Election Day, so let’s all blow off a little steam together with a friendly competition.

Sign up to play solo or organize a team of up to 4 players.

**INDIVIDUAL ENTRY: $25**
Compete as a team of one.
_**[SI](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=6257972c7a&e=5886ca081d)**_[ _**GN UP AS AN INDIVIDUAL**_](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=1bcce8d2a2&e=5886ca081d)

**TEAM SPONSOR: $100**
As a team sponsor, you can invite up to 3 friends to join your team.
**_[SIGN UP AS A TEAM SPONSOR](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=3045c6a301&e=5886ca081d)_**

**CATEGORY SPONSOR: $250**
As a category sponsor, you can invite up to 3 friends to join your team and will be recognized as the sponsor of a trivia category.
[_**SIGN UP AS A CATEGORY SPONSOR**_](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b096ce81d7&e=5886ca081d)

**TRIVIA SPONSOR: $500**
As a trivia sponsor, you can invite up to 3 friends to join your team and will be recognized as a main sponsor of the TGIF Trivia evening.
[_**SIGN UP AS A TRIVIA SPONSOR**_](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c2ca3546dc&e=5886ca081d)

**QUIZMASTER: $1,000**
Ever wanted to grab pancakes with Pat? Here's your chance. As a quizmaster, you can invite up to 3 friends to join your team and will be recognized as the top-tier sponsor of the TGIF Trivia evening. You'll also be invited to a one-on-one breakfast after election day with Congresswoman Pat Hackett at a date of your choosing.
**[_SIGN UP AS A QUIZMASTER_](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=fea232658d&e=5886ca081d)**

The winner will receive a Pat Prize Pack.

We hope to see you on the TGIF Trivia via Zoom this Friday evening!

Team Hackett

body:
|

Folks,

It pains me to say this, but Democrats are all in on boosting my opponent Gary Peters.

I'm talking about Chuck Schumer. He knows that if he can secure Michigan, that Democrats **WILL TAKE CONTROL OF THE SENATE**.

| [SAVE THE SENATE](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8fb2233f07c74685bca4b96480684bff&_e=kVT-WW3iq_2HanQ_VEgDC8QITj-FM9Yh4rsYGd1OX3lG-gYWUEBddET_h7SXjYVAgH-KBQlZeBwFthjhtCMPCfKLdpvaoOauSUiqX5nPC9CZZ4-Db0_jYtav_Cix9Btxv1tY1LKoVt7IUy6ulqLeszG6dfAy0R8SLDOCtK3ljdGUwAPiFlZH9HSdyxLh-IkD4PkpzGoYEj1d6mmJsZEcTCFBQF0L2sZea5wq4Ngknx9EBKiEtSXoesu85vZvlDImPINjiU0sadvoxIhtPS_8Ydfo4IVQL_is12C6h8esBBZel1Ekv9afksuAx_ByS4PILaTmP4F9NYTjdhCKJf9N2R_Wjmkn-r5r1kHmzDiVmnWAR7nV9bNm6P0ycXKxvudUWIGt8I9J4UZP5h0g9QYOBJTnAadMWrCOMC3GfBOy4kqCyO5dU-HS3T7b8F1JvdcX3w9nHKJL4qzlGJr5ChO3GFIZbJEXH9XzIrqXmsQjzy02yp4zk0xOUEJaB5UCQwNisAE2ioSwNGITspUd7F5Hkw%3D%3D)
---

If you don't believe me, look at how much Gary Peters has raised in the last three months.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8fb2233f07c74685bca4b96480684bff&_e=kVT-WW3iq_2HanQ_VEgDC8QITj-FM9Yh4rsYGd1OX3lG-gYWUEBddET_h7SXjYVAgH-KBQlZeBwFthjhtCMPCfKLdpvaoOauSUiqX5nPC9CZZ4-Db0_jYtav_Cix9Btxv1tY1LKoVt7IUy6ulqLeszG6dfAy0R8SLDOCtK3ljdGUwAPiFlZH9HSdyxLh-IkD4PkpzGoYEj1d6mmJsZEcTCFBQF0L2sZea5wq4Ngknx9EBKiEtSXoesu85vZvlDImPINjiU0sadvoxIhtPS_8Ydfo4IVQL_is12C6h8esBBZel1Ekv9afksuAx_ByS4PIPT79W90ITO87Zz--2SZq64pCuV7WK21pnsxEU9f7say9Z-mdV-0wN83VFECHWMYgY4rjI2kj-sQdqkMHLcT7nwe8ytOiFQBR5nXgpLqOKmcuA29-uqdMN-yw0sfhfgRQn-AxwygvK7gPxIwonV6rm92VquKR51hLqhfVfsx09A82s722L8-NuSzIczo94RRvn8ttHcIx556vWz8U1Eq-JA%3D%3D)

This race is so important. It's **THE MOST IMPORTANT RACE** not only for Michigan's sake, but for the fate of our country. We're fighting to save our nation's identity... plain and simple, and I've got to have your support if we're going to save it from Socialism.

[STOP SOCIALISM](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8fb2233f07c74685bca4b96480684bff&_e=kVT-WW3iq_2HanQ_VEgDC8QITj-FM9Yh4rsYGd1OX3lG-gYWUEBddET_h7SXjYVAgH-KBQlZeBwFthjhtCMPCfKLdpvaoOauSUiqX5nPC9CZZ4-Db0_jYtav_Cix9Btxv1tY1LKoVt7IUy6ulqLeszG6dfAy0R8SLDOCtK3ljdGUwAPiFlZH9HSdyxLh-IkD4PkpzGoYEj1d6mmJsZEcTCFBQF0L2sZea5wq4Ngknx9EBKiEtSXoesu85vZvlDImPINjiU0sadvoxIhtPS_8Ydfo4IVQL_is12C6h8esBBZel1Ekv9afksuAx_ByS4PIdLJtMyY24FZtNjoBRHeUok07a-C4q0qWIgnjMJpeZMR4p1uoaEdUiUQ5XZ4kqz69r5Lx_JcD1gIvodwmyNLbkw5pa67fVsZHU1N-7-rEPi6fnxhWfncpRvT8U9mwdhmuU6V2QY49HgGSP1JW1WkULbFM4TkXRW_l8p7zP8t5LD6zLxKoT_ulcRxr8Bii9_rUnL0rtDjiba6WZxFVwb5DhA%3D%3D)
---

There's no other way to put it than that we have less than 13 days to save our nation from Socialism, or it's inevitable that we will be at the mercy of the radical Left mob.

I've got to have your support **[NOW,](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8fb2233f07c74685bca4b96480684bff&_e=kVT-WW3iq_2HanQ_VEgDC8QITj-FM9Yh4rsYGd1OX3lG-gYWUEBddET_h7SXjYVAgH-KBQlZeBwFthjhtCMPCfKLdpvaoOauSUiqX5nPC9CZZ4-Db0_jYtav_Cix9Btxv1tY1LKoVt7IUy6ulqLeszG6dfAy0R8SLDOCtK3ljdGUwAPiFlZH9HSdyxLh-IkD4PkpzGoYEj1d6mmJsZEcTCFBQF0L2sZea5wq4Ngknx9EBKiEtSXoesu85vZvlDImPINjiU0sadvoxIhtPS_8Ydfo4IVQL_is12C6h8esBBZel1Ekv9afksuAx_ByS4PIJNjuQagDsPU99jeYrbRYrCO9UAlpeOQPxLY-BI0VVYvUu8sk7suhTT9AYWYLkCC-iynAIBXXTYh542V3Lt_wDUoRaREgCZFqYX6noc4Wsb3GwDZjUFBqhlrkBaV94rqX8dc4EOekpO_BpJZksH0LhfgiumhKQjFiVmyIUsMRuJNrk0WSRb0DL7Q_88Klhr-KWkmxTR7IYWWw102TORTFAQ%3D%3D)** not tomorrow or the next day. Without your support, I can't stand up to the radical Left mob and defeat my opponent, who's at the mercy of Chuck Schumer's Socialist agenda.

Please do your part to save America before there's nothing left to do.

[**Please ACT TODAY.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8fb2233f07c74685bca4b96480684bff&_e=kVT-WW3iq_2HanQ_VEgDC8QITj-FM9Yh4rsYGd1OX3lG-gYWUEBddET_h7SXjYVAgH-KBQlZeBwFthjhtCMPCfKLdpvaoOauSUiqX5nPC9CZZ4-Db0_jYtav_Cix9Btxv1tY1LKoVt7IUy6ulqLeszG6dfAy0R8SLDOCtK3ljdGUwAPiFlZH9HSdyxLh-IkD4PkpzGoYEj1d6mmJsZEcTCFBQF0L2sZea5wq4Ngknx9EBKiEtSXoesu85vZvlDImPINjiU0sadvoxIhtPS_8Ydfo4IVQL_is12C6h8esBBZel1Ekv9afksuAx_ByS4PIS_rvzeIi7NWKGYLCYnISsDqd6WbUZjZdV4xLlLXwVrYUlLiLh1DoOZuMZHuNWJjg4nxywDZoogSi4e54ahDu-eDGMCYlx03BMiWbH4TyxK367vhtWH_cLgpPlRi_IkBItm6cVVWTXb5LkWyarxBVujjbKbVJJTSrfTDRT-WLMyCLRkYYJP8ilykzyYVZPtuxFe8kkVrkPaDpv53g4sDNAg%3D%3D)

Thank you for your support and patriotism,

John James

subject: Our tribal communities deserve a leader like Tom

Tom has also been a leading voice in the fight to permanently ban uranium mining near the Grand Canyon and clean up the toxic legacy of the past.
